creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 154111
Makefile patch adding CPE information

devel/gmake has had vulnerabilities with a CPE identifier assigned (e.g. CVE-2000-0151). This patch adds CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[0].

[0] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
